request: lets rank all audi R8 models
title: RANKING EVERY AUDI R8 MODEL
close_narration: Which of these iconic R8s would you park in your garage?
order_rationale: Ordered from the most exclusive and powerful to the original and foundational model.

entries.name: R8 LMX
entries.label: LIMITED EDITION
entries.one_line_fact: In 2014, Audi unveiled the R8 LMX, a 570-horsepower beast and the world's first production car with laser high-beam headlights. Only 99 units were produced, making it a rare gem.

entries.name: R8 GT
entries.label: LIGHTWEIGHT POWERHOUSE
entries.one_line_fact: Then came the 2011 R8 GT, shedding weight and boosting power to 560 horses. With only 333 coupes and 333 Spyders made, it's a collector's dream.

entries.name: R8 V10 Plus
entries.label: TRACK-FOCUSED
entries.one_line_fact: Next, the 2013 R8 V10 Plus hit the scene with 550 horsepower, ceramic brakes, and carbon fiber accents. It was the sharpest tool in Audi's shed.

entries.name: R8 V8 Coupe
entries.label: ORIGINAL ICON
entries.one_line_fact: At number one, the original 2007 R8 V8 Coupe debuted with 420 horsepower, a manual gearbox, and timeless design. It set the stage for all R8s to follow.
